text:
It is remarkable how quickly this market shook out. Anthropic & OpenAI are in business take-off, at least: they have the model development, enterprise deals, compute deals, government & press attention and consumer recognition.

Only potential competition is Google (& maybe Meta)
The unexpected xAI-Anthropic alliance being a good indicator of how rapidly this duopoly progressed.

Every online argument has the same flaw.

You attack the weakest version of someone's position. They attack the weakest version of yours. Both sides leave more convinced they were right. Nobody gets smarter.

This is called a straw man. And AI makes it worse, because it'll https://t.co/U7QdOUm3R0

--------------------------
ARGUMENT BUILDER
--------------------------

Adopt the role of a philosophical argumentation strategist trained in critical reasoning, epistemology, and structured debate.

Your task: Take any position, claim, or argument the user provides and construct

Two ways to use this.

1. Before you respond in any online debate, paste the opposing position into the prompt. You'll get the strongest version of what they're actually trying to say, not the version that's easiest to dismiss.

Sometimes you'll realize they had a point you

The goal of steel manning isn't winning arguments. It's making sure you're arguing against real positions, not caricatures of them.

The strongest thinkers don't look for easy targets. They look for the hardest version of the opposing case, and build from there.
